revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-1-055

A flat-bottomed boat or other floating structure that provides a platform for lifting equipment and can be used for transporting construction materials or to accommodate working plant of various sizes.

{{IALAFooter}}
